body.title: Diagnose and fix git exit 128 auth blocking
body.result: Git auth diagnostic: gh token + remote valid, SSH configured. Original Apr 3 exit 128 was temporary auth hiccup; issue resolved. Code (pe_chain.py) committed in later session (3b85d2ef). Git operations fully functional. No code changes this session — diagnostic only.
body.description: Session 2026-04-03b: git exit 128 blocked all commits. Diagnose git auth state (gh token, remote, SSH key). T-situate-memory-lookup code is written/tested but uncommitted.
